special_statblocks.name: Aberrant Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 40 + 10 for each spell level above 4th

special_statblocks.name: Avatar of Death
special_statblocks.hp: half the hit point maximum of its summoner

special_statblocks.name: Beast of the Land
special_statblocks.hp: 5 + five times your ranger level (the beast has a number of Hit Dice [d8s] equal to your ranger level)

special_statblocks.name: Beast of the Sea
special_statblocks.hp: 5 + five times your ranger level (the beast has a number of Hit Dice [d8s] equal to your ranger level)

special_statblocks.name: Beast of the Sky
special_statblocks.hp: 4 + four times your ranger level (the beast has a number of Hit Dice [d6s] equal to your ranger level)

special_statblocks.name: Bestial Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 20 (Air only) or 30 (Land and Water only) + 5 for each spell level above 2nd

special_statblocks.name: Celestial Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 40 + 10 for each spell level above 5th
special_statblocks.ac: 11 + the level of the spell + 2 (Defender only)

special_statblocks.name: Construct Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 40 + 15 for each spell level above 4th

special_statblocks.name: Dancing Item
special_statblocks.hp: 10 + five times your bard level

special_statblocks.name: Deck Defender
special_statblocks.hp: 5 + five times your level (the deck defender has a number of Hit Dice [d8s] equal to your level)

special_statblocks.name: Draconic Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 50 + 10 for each spell level above 5th (the dragon has a number of Hit Dice [d10s] equal to the level of the spell)

special_statblocks.name: Drake Companion
special_statblocks.hp: 5 + five times your ranger level (the drake has a number of Hit Dice [d10s] equal to your ranger level)

special_statblocks.name: Elemental Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 50 + 10 for each spell level above 4th

special_statblocks.name: Fey Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 30 + 10 for each spell level above 3rd

special_statblocks.name: Fiendish Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 50 (Demon only) or 40 (Devil only) or 60 (Yugoloth only) + 15 for each spell level above 6th

special_statblocks.name: Homunculus Servant
special_statblocks.hp: 1 + your Intelligence modifier + your artificer level (the homunculus has a number of Hit Dice [d4s] equal to your artificer level)

special_statblocks.name: Meeseeks
special_statblocks.hp: -(immune to damage)

special_statblocks.name: Ras Nsi
special_statblocks.hp: 127 (17d8 + 51) reduced to 107; subtract 1 for each day that passes during the adventure

special_statblocks.name: Reaper Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 40 + 10 for each spell level above 4th

special_statblocks.name: Shadow Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 35 + 15 for each spell level above 3rd

special_statblocks.name: Steel Defender
special_statblocks.hp: 2 + your Intelligence modifier + five times your artificer level (the defender has a number of Hit Dice [d8s] equal to your artificer level)

special_statblocks.name: Undead Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 30 (Ghostly and Putrid only) or 20 (Skeletal only) + 10 for each spell level above 3rd

special_statblocks.name: Wildfire Spirit
special_statblocks.hp: 5 + five times your druid level
